{{Quote|With that fool out of the way, I can seize power.|Gavern Starlock|<ref name="Droids (1986) 5">[[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' (1986) 5]]</ref>}}
'''Gavern Starlock''' was a baron and advisor to Prince [[Jagoda]] of [[R-Duba]]. He purchased [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] to act as a translator to the prince.

Starlock betrayed his people by helping the people of [[Dorande]] in an attempt to conquer R-Duba, but his plans were foiled by the efforts of 3PO, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[Kirk Windjammer]].

He had a droid, [[BX-00]], who served as his driver, bodyguard and assassin.
